author: 鱼亦乐 (yuyile)
abstract: macOS disk cleanup skill with a pixel-art cat that physically walks through a hand-drawn apartment to clean up junk. Scans developer caches, system caches, large files, performance metrics, and network diagnostics. Presents an interactive pixel-art web page where users confirm deletions — the cat sweeps dust piles in real-time as files are permanently removed. Includes persistent memory across sessions: preferences, never-touch lists, and cleanup history stored in ~/.disk-cleanup-cat/.
